raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Metaphorically framing suffering as having a singular transformative purpose through imagery of purification and refinement.",
  "implicit_claims": ["Suffering possesses a purposeful function rather than being arbitrary or meaningless", "Purification (removal of the 'useless and impure') constitutes suffering's highest value", "This function is singular and supreme over other possible roles or interpretations"],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent as extended metaphor within a teleological or alchemical worldview; relies on consistent imagery of fire/refinement without internal contradiction.",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "When received as evocative literary device that aids reflection, consolation, or artistic exploration of adversity in non-literal contexts.",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "When treated as literal proposition asserting exclusive purpose of suffering, especially to justify harm or dismiss other dimensions of pain."
}

parsed_json.communicative_function: Metaphorically framing suffering as having a singular transformative purpose through imagery of purification and refinement.
implicit_claims: Suffering possesses a purposeful function rather than being arbitrary or meaningless
Purification (removal of the 'useless and impure') constitutes suffering's highest value
This function is singular and supreme over other possible roles or interpretations
parsed_json.coherence_assessment: Internally coherent as extended metaphor within a teleological or alchemical worldview; relies on consistent imagery of fire/refinement without internal contradiction.
parsed_json.conditions_for_usefulness: When received as evocative literary device that aids reflection, consolation, or artistic exploration of adversity in non-literal contexts.
parsed_json.conditions_for_misleading: When treated as literal proposition asserting exclusive purpose of suffering, especially to justify harm or dismiss other dimensions of pain.
